title: Generic Enchants
description: This datapack adds basic enchants like lightning enchant, frost, tornadoes enchant & more through /enchant
body:
# Generic Enchants

This datapack was made for fun and is not implemented in the vanilla gameplay, each enchant is only accessible through /enchant @s generic_enchant:enchant_name 1

## Enchantments list

- Frost
  - Freezes the target in powder snow (not working as expected)
- Levitation
  - Levitates the target (not working)
- Lightning
  - Summons lightning at the target (working)
- Tornado
  - Has a chance of summoning a tornado 10 blocks behind the target
- Wither
  - Gives the target the wither effect (not working)
